column1: We collect account, order, and support interaction data to deliver and improve storefront services.

column1: Collected data is used for checkout processing, fraud checks, logistics coordination, and customer support.

column1: Data retention follows legal and tax obligations, and deletion requests are handled through compliance workflows.

column1: You can review and update optional consent settings in your compliance center at any time.
